Subject: MV HE SHENG DONG FANG / 37500 DWT/N.CHINA INT RIZHAO/ 15-17 DEC
 
DEAR CHARTERING DESK / MARCONS GROUP
GOOD DAY.
 
PLEASED TO HEAR SUITABLE CARGO/ORDER FOR BELOW CANDIDATE:-
 
MV.HE SHENG DONG FANG (37.5K / 2010BLT / GEARED GRABBER) 
-- OPEN N.CHINA INT RIZHAO/ 15-17 DEC
-- TRY ANY DIRECTIONS WITHIN PG - FAR EAST RANGE INCLUDING BENGAL BAY.
-- 2X25MT COILS / DECK & HATCH LOADING / CONCENTRATES & BAUXITE / SALT &
SULPHUR / BAGGED CEMENT ETC OK, BUT NO BULK CEMENT / BULK CLINKER. 
-- TRADING WITHIN FAR EAST - S.E.ASIA - PG - AFRICA RANGE, INCLUDING
W.AFRICA HRA, EXCLUDING GOA / RED SEA / AUS / NZ / USA / CANADA / RUSSIA /
EUROPE / BLACK SEA AND EXCLUDING SANCTIONED COUNTRIES/AREAS.  
-- LAST 6 CARGOES: STEELS & GENERAL CARGO (CURRENT) / COAL / BULK FERT /
BAGGED CGO / SILICA SAND / BULK DAP / GENERAL CARGO / IRON ORE / GENERAL
CARGO / FERRO NICKEL.
-- BOD ABT 670- 730 MT IFO / 55 MGO
-- TCT / VC / LL / BOP OK, NO SP / NO PERIOD.    
 
FLAG/CLASS: TAIZHOU,CHINA / CCS
BUILT(DELIVERED)/SHIPYARD: 2010.04, JIANGSU EASTERN IN CHINA
TYPE: DOUBLE SKIN SINGLE DECK BULK CARRIER
SDWT 37500MTS ON 10.40M SSW, TPC 50.0

UNIFORM LOAD 2.5MT/M2.  
HATCH COVER TYPE: HYDRAULIC FOLDING TYPE. 
P&I CLUB: THE LONDON P&I CLUB

= 30MT MAX)

A60 BULKHEAD

HOLD VENTILATION: FITTED

DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (0.5-1.25 METRES) WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS:
